jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Oliveboard
jsonLd.description:
Oliveboard invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oliveboard:
Oliveboard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oliveboard!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
